name: C2xSetMapObjectSize
title: C2xSetMapObjectSize
tables: long C2xSetMapObjectSize( long handle, float size ); // form 1
long C2xSetMapObjectSize( long handle, float width, float height ); // form 2
Sets either the size (form 1) or the height and width (form 2) of a map object.
handle Reference of the map object
size Size of the map object in meters
width Width of the map object in meters
height Height of the map object in meters
0 if success, else the set went wrong
Example See Map Window API example.
